VCE Economics
Unit 3 Exam Practice

Past VCAA exam questions filtered to the 2023 Study Design. Attempt questions under exam conditions, then receive AI-generated feedback.

U3 Exam Practice
Welcome back, . You have previous answers saved — pick up where you left off.
AOS 1 — The Role of Markets
Supply & demand, price elasticity, efficiency, market failure, and government intervention. Questions drawn from VCAA exams 2013–2024, filtered to the 2023 Study Design.
AOS 2 — Domestic Macroeconomic Goals
Circular flow, aggregate demand & supply factors, business cycle, macroeconomic goals, and living standards. Questions drawn from VCAA exams 2013–2024.
AOS 3 — Australia & the International Economy
Balance of payments, exchange rate, terms of trade, international competitiveness, and their impacts on macroeconomic goals and living standards.
